omitted_declarations.policy_reference: I want to inform you that whenever you use my Service, in a case of an error in the app I collect data and information (through third party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing my Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.

You may provide us with information when you use the App, such as when you create an account, contact us with inquiries, or respond to one of our surveys. This information may include your name, email address, and any other information you choose to provide.
